description: Style NoteThis summer is the season of mixing it up with fusion fashion - creations by mineral are spot on when it comes to that elusive cohesive combination of trends. This dress is perfect for the contemporary woman who knows how to make head turn without losing her cool. Modern and innovative design details sets this piece above the rest. Product DescriptionCoral sleeveless dress, has a square neckline with a curved centre, net panel with lace detail below the neckline, net panel around the arm holes, vertical and horizontal pin tucks on the chest with net panels and lace detail on either side, gathers from below the bust, horizontal net panel in the skirt and a net panel at the hemlineMaterial and CareCotton blendMachine wash warmTumble dry low Use warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M which measures 84 cm from the shoulder to the hemline
